input.headline: Inside the secret school keeping an ancient art alive

raw.headline: Inside the secret school keeping an ancient art alive

winner: The principal of that secret school just confessed, "We've been teaching kids how to carve stone tablets... but don't tell them about our next-level emojis course!

candidates.text: The principal of that secret school just confessed, "We've been teaching kids how to carve stone tablets... but don't tell them about our next-level emojis course!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with emojis in a traditional setting, concise and specific"}

candidates.text: What's the password for their time capsule at this secret school? Ancient Greek, of course - Password: Algebra!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'password' and 'Ancient Greek,' but 'Algebra' feels a bit forced and unrelated to the context of an ancient art. It lacks full surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the antique vase attend a secret school? Because it wanted to learn how to stay alive, inside and out!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the vase attending school, but the connection to the headline is weak and the humor feels forced."}

candidates.text: Why did the old art attend a modern school? Because it wanted to learn to be secretive again!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "Lacks surprise and specificity; the joke is generic and relies on a weak pun."}

candidates.text: At last, a place where even chalkboards can draw the line.
